wins.event: Record FY EPS of $51.32 (+27% YoY); Q4 EPS $14.01, ROE 16%, ROTE 17.1%
GBM full-year revenue $41.5B (+18% YoY) — record; #1 M&A adviser for 23rd consecutive year
Equities FY revenue $16.5B record (+$3B vs prior year); Q4 equities financing $2.1B record (+42% YoY)
AWM AUS record $3.6T; $115B raised in alternatives FY; pretax margin target raised to 30%
Dividend raised 50% YoY (+$0.50 to $4.50/qtr); $32B remaining buyback capacity; $4.2B returned in Q4

risks.event: General macro caveats — economic growth, policy uncertainty, geopolitical developments, market volatility
FY non-compensation costs +9% YoY driven by higher transaction-based activity
Marcus deposit NIM compression partially offset wealth-management lending growth

guidance.notes: Raised AWM pretax margin target to 30% (from prior); new wealth-management fee-based inflow target of 5% annually; alternative AUS target $750B by 2030; $1B annual incentive fee target reaffirmed. 2026 tax rate ~20%.

_notes: Exceptional quarter with multiple records, raised long-term targets, 50% dividend increase. CEO Solomon at peak confidence with strategy update. Realised excess_5d -3.3% — classic sell-the-news after IB-cycle-recovery rally; pure feature gap (no peer-bank-recent-reaction signal), not a sentiment-extraction failure. Both pipelines correctly read this as bullish.
